name: Jack Lawrence
abstract: Jack Lawrence (born Jacob Louis Schwartz; April 7, 1912 – March 16, 2009) was an American songwriter. He was inducted into the Songwriters Hall of Fame in 1975.

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Weber
about_quotes.evidence: Are you familiar with the composer Jack Lawrence? Jack Lawrence wrote a string of pop hits...
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Weber interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, June 2, 2012
